description_long: This is a modern, industrial-style control desk featuring a large, horizontal touch screen interface with illuminated blue graphics and circular UI elements. The desk is constructed from a metallic material with a matte gray finish, and its front panel is solid and rectangular, providing a sturdy base. On the top surface, there are several control buttons, a rotary knob, and a small, upright monitor or tablet stand at the rear edge. The sides of the desk are sleek and minimal, with the structure tapering inward toward the base, giving it a streamlined appearance. The back of the desk is plain, with a recessed panel and the rear of the monitor visible. This desk is designed for interactive, high-tech environments such as control rooms or command centers.
description: A high-tech, metallic control desk with a large touch screen, control buttons, and a rear-mounted monitor, finished in matte gray with blue illuminated graphics.
description_view_0: Front view shows the interactive touch screen, control buttons, rotary knob, and upright monitor stand.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the desk's tapered base and the profile of the monitor stand and control surface.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a plain, recessed panel and the back of the monitor, with no visible controls.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the desk's angular profile and the arrangement of controls on the surface.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side features the large touch screen, control buttons, rotary knob, and monitor stand, indicating this is the front; the back is plain with only the rear of the monitor visible.
attribute_usage_context: interactive control station for monitoring or managing systems
